_comment: Phase 5 / VFX_ASSETS WS-A hero GLBs. Generated from hero data by src/test/_gen_hero_specs.test.ts — every hero in an enabled KayKit cohort (Knight/Mage/Barbarian/Rogue) gets its own retextured CC0 base, recolored to its three-color palette and trimmed to the clips the animator drives. Raw bases live in tmp/asset_src/kaykit (gitignored); only the optimized output under public/assets/heroes is committed. No-budget policy (DECISIONS 2026-06-13): one file per cohort hero, storage is not a constraint.
